title: Fractional Snow Cover 2016-present (raster 20 m), Europe, daily
description: The Fractional Snow Cover (FSC) product provides the fraction of the surface covered by snow at the top of canopy (FSC-TOC) and on ground (FSC-OG) per pixel as a percentage (0% – 100%) with a spatial resolution of 20 m x 20 m. It is generated in near real-time at European scale based on optical satellite data from the Sentinel-2 constellation.

links.title: Legal notice on the use of Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data
Homepage of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service

cdse-s3.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem S3
cdse-s3.description: This endpoint provides access to EO data which is stored on the object storage of both CloudFerro Cloud and OpenTelekom Cloud (OTC). See the [documentation](https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html) for more information, including how to get credentials.

creodias-s3.title: CREODIAS S3
creodias-s3.description: Comprehensive Earth Observation Data (EODATA) archive offered by CREODIAS as a commercial part of CDSE, designed to provide users with access to a vast repository of satellite data without predefined quota limits

QAFLAGS.title: Quality Flags (QAFLAGS)
QAFLAGS.description: Bitmask layer with pixel quality flags

classification:bitfields.name: hillshade
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located in the hillshade

classes.name: not_hillshade
classes.description: The pixel is not located in the hillshade

classes.name: hillshade
classes.description: The pixel is located in the hillshade

classification:bitfields.name: tree_cover_too_high
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the tree cover density is too high for an accurate detection and forest correction

classes.name: not_tree_cover_too_high
classes.description: The tree cover density is not too high for an accurate detection and forest correction

classes.name: tree_cover_too_high
classes.description: The tree cover density is too high for an accurate detection and forest correction

classification:bitfields.name: cloud_cover
classification:bitfields.description: The snow fraction was estimated despite cloud cover (except high clouds)

classes.name: not_cloud_cover
classes.description: The pixel was not initially identified as a cloud.

classes.name: cloud_cover
classes.description: The pixel was initially identified as a cloud but snow was detected and snow fraction estimated.

classification:bitfields.name: tree_cover_undefined
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the tree cover density was defined or available on the pixel

classes.name: tree_cover_defined
classes.description: The tree cover density was defined on the pixel

classes.name: tree_cover_undefined
classes.description: The tree cover density was not defined or not available on the pixel

classification:bitfields.name: snow_found_in_shades
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is located in the hillshade and was identified as snow-covered

classes.name: not_snow_found_in_shades
classes.description: The pixel is not snow-covered and located in the hillshades

classes.name: snow_found_in_shades
classes.description: The pixel was detected as snow-covered despite its location in the hillshades

FSCTOC.title: Top of canopy fractional snow cover (%)
FSCTOC.description: Estimate of the top of canopy fractional snow cover (visible from space)

FSCTOC-QA.title: Quality layer for the Top-of-canopy snow fraction (FSCTOC) layer
FSCTOC-QA.description: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the Top-of-canopy snow fraction layer.

FSCOG.title: On-ground fractional snow cover (%)
FSCOG.description: Estimated fractional snow cover on the ground (i.e. snow fraction estimated under the canopy or visible from space in the absence of tree cover).

FSCOG-QA.title: Quality layer for the on-ground snow fraction (FSCOG) layer
FSCOG-QA.description: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the on-ground snow fraction layer.

NDSI.title: Normalized Difference Snow Index (%) of detected snow areas
NDSI.description: Values of the spectral index Normalized Difference Snow Index (%) for snow-covered-pixels

CLD.title: MAJA L2A cloud and cloud shadow mask
CLD.description: Bitmask layer defining the cloud and cloud shadow mask derived from the input MAJA Sentinel-2 level 2A product

classification:bitfields.name: all_clouds_and_shadows
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel was identified as part of a cloud or cloud-shadow. Does not include thinnest clouds.

classes.name: not_all_clouds_and_shadows
classes.description: The pixel is neither a cloud (expect thin cloud) or a cloud shadow

classes.name: all_clouds_and_shadows
classes.description: The pixel is identified as part of a cloud (not a thin cloud) or cloud-shadow.

classification:bitfields.name: all_clouds
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel was identified as part of a cloud. Does not include thinnest clouds.

classes.name: not_all_clouds
classes.description: The pixel is not identified as a cloud (except thin cloud)

classes.name: all_clouds
classes.description: The pixel is identified as a cloud (except thin cloud)

classification:bitfields.name: mono_temporal
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the cloud pixel was detected through the mono-temporal approach

classes.name: not_mono_temporal
classes.description: The pixel was not detected as cloudy through the mono-temporal approach.

classes.name: mono_temporal
classes.description: The pixel was detected as cloudy through the mono-temporal approach.

classification:bitfields.name: multi_temporal
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the cloud pixel was detected through the multi-temporal approach

classes.name: not_multi_temporal
classes.description: The pixel was not detected as cloudy through the multi-temporal approach

classes.name: multi_temporal
classes.description: The pixel was detected as cloudy through the multi-temporal approach

classification:bitfields.name: thin_cloud
classification:bitfields.description: Indicates whether the pixel is detected as part of the thinnest clouds

classes.name: not_thin_cloud
classes.description: The pixel is not detected as a thin cloud

classes.name: thin_cloud
classes.description: The pixel is detected as a thin cloud

classification:bitfields.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_in_image
classification:bitfields.description: Cloud shadow mask cast from a cloud visible in the image

classes.name: not_cloud_shadow_from_cloud_in_image
classes.description: The pixel is not a cloud shadow cast from a cloud visible in the image

classes.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_in_image
classes.description: The pixel is a cloud shadow cast from a cloud visible in the image

classification:bitfields.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_outside_image
classification:bitfields.description: Cloud shadow mask cast from a cloud located outside the image

classes.name: not_cloud_shadow_from_cloud_outside_image
classes.description: The pixel is not a cloud shadow cast from a cloud located outside in the image

classes.name: cloud_shadow_from_cloud_outside_image
classes.description: The pixel is a cloud shadow cast from a cloud located outside in the image
